Code with Claude anywhere

Powerful agentic coding in your IDE, terminal, or on the go. 了解更多

Terminal
Original

Best-in-class coding agent that runs in your terminal, edits files, runs scripts, and more.

npm install -g @anthropic/claude-cli
IDE extension
New

All the power of Claude Code, right at home in VS Code, Cursor, or Windsurf.

Install in VS Code
Web
预览

Run coding tasks seamlessly across your browser and phone.
